The '''Gemstone Crab''' is a [[world boss]] that moves between three mines in the [[Tlati Rainforest]] approximately every 10 minutes. It has no defence, low offensive stats, and effectively infinite hitpoints, making it ideal for combat training, and can be fought in large groups. The only requirement to fight the crab is completion of [[Children of the Sun]] in order to access [[Varlamore]].

The health bar of the crab is not affected by player damage, regardless of how many players are attacking it. Instead, it depletes over time to indicate how long until the crab will burrow to its next location. The crab remains stationary for approximately 10 minutes until its health bar is fully depleted, after which it will burrow underground to relocate. At each of the three mines, a [[Cave (Gemstone Crab)|cave]] can be crawled through to quickly take players to the crab's current location and continue to fight.

While fighting the crab, players earn 12.5% less experience per hit than usual, at 87.5% the usual experience (1 damage = 3.5 experience, rather than 4). Despite this experience reduction, the Gemstone Crab typically offers higher experience rates than other commonly killed crabs because there is less overall downtime and no experience is lost from overkill damage (e.g. rolling 15 damage would normally grant 60 experience, but if an enemy has only 1 hitpoint, you would receive only 4 experience). Other crabs will still provide marginally higher experience if the player has a low max hit.

'''{{Colour|Red|Warning:}}''' Though unlikely, it is possible to take small amounts of damage and be killed by the crab. Players, especially [[hardcore ironmen]], should be cautious when low on hitpoints.

==Transportation==
The Gemstone Crab spawns in any one of three locations within the Tlati Rainforest.
{{LocTableHead|league=yes}}
{{LocLine
|name = Gemstone Crab
|location = [[Tlati Rainforest]]
|levels = 160
|members = Yes
|plane = 0
|1275,3160|1351,3110|1237,3042
|mtype = pin
|leagueRegion = Varlamore
}}
{{LocTableBottom}}

The Gemstone Crab can be easily located by accessing any of the [[Cave (Gemstone Crab)|caves]] near its spawn points. These caves always lead to its current location. Therefore, it is recommended to travel to the nearest spawn and use the cave network, rather than world-hopping. There are a few main ways to reach these spawns:
*[[Pendant of ates|Pendant of Ates]] to [[Kastori]] (after activating the corresponding [[Statue of Ates]])
*[[Fairy rings|Fairy ring]] code {{Fairycode|ais}} to [[Auburn Valley]], run south-west along the [[River Varla]], take [[Achilka|Achilka's boat service]] to Kastori or Tal Teklan
*[[Quetzal Transport System]] (requires starting [[Twilight's Promise]]) via [[Renu]]:
**[[Tal Teklan]] and [[Kastori]] both have [[Landing Site|landing sites]] that are similar distances. Tal Teklan's site is already built, while Kastori's needs to be built by the player before it can be used. A few common ways to reach [[Renu]] are:
***[[Civitas illa Fortis Teleport]]
***[[Hunter cape]] teleport to the [[Hunter Guild]]
***[[Basic quetzal whistle|Quetzal whistle]] to the Hunter Guild
***[[Varrock Teleport]], run to the east gate, travel to [[Civitas illa Fortis]] with the quetzal [[Primio]]
***[[Charter ship|Charter Ship]] to [[Civitas illa Fortis]] and run west
***[[Fairy rings|Fairy ring]] code {{Fairycode|ais}} to [[Auburn Valley]] and run north-west to Renu

==Mechanics==
* [[Ruby bolts (e)|Ruby bolt (e)]] special attacks treat the boss as if it has 300 [[Hitpoints]] and will deal 60 damage, increased to 66 if using a [[Zaryte crossbow]].
* The Gemstone Crab does not count towards slayer tasks, thus players will not receive a damage or accuracy bonus from a [[slayer helmet]] or [[black mask]].
* A [[dwarf multicannon]] cannot be placed in the crab's vicinity.
* [[Thrall|Thralls]] are unable to attack the Gemstone Crab, even though they can be summoned near it.
* The Gemstone Crab can be walked under while it is active, though its normal attacks can target and damage players if they stand in the quadrant it is focusing its attacks. The center tile of the 5x5 square it occupies is safe from attacks from all sides, though all players standing underneath will be shoved out when the Crab burrows with the message {{Mes|The burrowing crab forces you out of its way.}}.

==Rewards==
Once the Gemstone Crab's health bar reaches 0%, it will burrow, shed a piece of its shell, and move to the next spawn location. The shell will remain for 90 seconds before disappearing into the ground. The 16 players who dealt the most damage to the crab may mine the shell for three random unnoted [[Uncut gem|uncut gems]], ranging from [[Uncut opal|opal]] up to [[Uncut dragonstone|dragonstone]].

If the player is among the 16 players who dealt the most damage, the message {{mes|You gained enough understanding of the crab to mine from its remains.|colour=green}} appears when the crab burrows away.

If the player is not among the top 16, attempting to mine the shell produces the message {{mes|Your understanding of the gemstone crab is not great enough to mine its shell.}}

==Changes==
{{Subject changes header}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 6 August 2025
|update = Varlamore & Summer Sweep-Up Combat Tweaks
|change = 
* Highlighting the Gemstone Crab's shell will no longer highlight random spiky shapes outside of the shell.
* The 16 players who deal the most damage to the crab will now be eligible to mine the crab's shell, instead of the first 16 players to deal damage.
* Chat messages now notify the top 16 players that they are eligible to mine the shell, and announce the three players who dealt the most damage.
* The eligibility chat message "You gained enough understanding of the crab to mine from its remains." is now highlighted green.
}}
{{Subject changes footer}}

==Trivia==
*The examine text appears to be a reference to Tamatoa, a giant crab from the Disney movie ''{{wp|Moana}}'' who performs a song called "Shiny".
*If the player has an open [[gem bag]] in their inventory when mining the Gemstone Crab, they will not receive the chat message "You mine an uncut ____ from the crab shell." when mining precious gems (i.e. those storable in the gem bag).
*The crab will occasionally burrow and immediately reappear in the same location instead of moving to the next. This may be a bug and will result in the crab's shell appearing in the same location as the crab.
*The gemstone crab was inspired by a community [https://www.reddit.com/r/2007scape/comments/1dsqu5u/emperor_sand_crab/ Reddit post.]{{CiteReddit|author=ModKieren|url=https://www.reddit.com/r/2007scape/comments/1mhp0fn/whoevers_idea_it_was_to_put_the_gem_crab_into_the/n71le63/|title=Whoever's idea it was to put the gem crab into the game:|quote=It was inspired by the community suggesting it!|date=5 August 2025|archiveurl=https://archive.is/PZfqk|archivedate=17 August 2025}}
* As of [[9 August]] [[2025]], 2,265 players have been slain by the gemstone crab, with 14 being [[hardcore ironmen]].{{CiteTwitter|author=OldSchoolRS|url=https://x.com/OldSchoolRS/status/1954241450931114386|date=9 August 2025|archiveurl=https://archive.ph/xENyM|archivedate=9 August 2025|quote=What happens when thousands of players flood a new expansion? We collected some Varlamore data to really see the bigger picture of crab deaths, orange hats and more 👀}}
** The amount of hardcore ironmen slain had increased to 34 as of [[29 August]] [[2025]].{{CiteTwitter|author=OldSchoolRS|url=https://x.com/OldSchoolRS/status/1961413881709961391|date=29 August 2025|archiveurl=https://archive.ph/v51jf|archivedate=30 August 2025|quote=Attention... A gentle reminder to 🦀 at your own risk.
The HCIM death count at the gemstone crab is 34.}}
* As of [[5 September]] [[2025]], players have picked up a total of 1.68 billion coins' worth of ammunition used at the boss.{{CiteTwitter|author=OldSchoolRS|url=https://x.com/OldSchoolRS/status/1963966072605872287|date=5 September 2025|archiveurl=https://archive.ph/sU9ed|archivedate=13 September 2025|quote=Did you know... In the first two weeks of Varlamore's release, adventurers looted over 1.68billion GP worth of arrows at the gemstone crab!}}
* Although the crab's real health bar is not displayed in game, its combat level of 160 would suggest that it actually has between 637 and 640 hitpoints.
* The gemstone crab had a festive override wearing a [[Santa hat]] during the [[2025 Christmas event/Gallery|2025]] Christmas event.
* The [[Minion (Demonic Pacts League)|Minion]] summon from the [[Demonic Pacts League]] states that it "will not fight against [[Yama]]", but it will also not attack the Gemstone Crab.
